entries.summary: Fix accented rider names (Pogačar etc.) costing 4cr
changes: normName() now applies NFD Unicode decomposition and strips combining marks before ASCII conversion
Pogačar, Møller, Martínez and all accented names now match correctly across CyclingFlash results and PCS startlists

entries.summary: Fix rider cost lookup — TdF riders now priced correctly
changes: riderCost() now calls normName() on input so case/punctuation differences never cause a miss
buildRiderCosts() stores all score keys as normName() output for consistent lookup
Both name orderings (Firstname Surname and SURNAME Firstname) indexed under normalised keys

entries.summary: Fix rider costs for PCS-format startlists
changes: buildRiderCosts now indexes both 'Firstname Surname' and 'SURNAME Firstname' name orderings so TdF and other PCS startlist riders get correct costs
Scraper normalizes PCS startlist names to 'Firstname Surname' title case on scrape
Push notification support with VAPID subscription flow
Restricted start riders shown on startlist cards
Scraper detects restricted riders from PCS startlist pages
Service worker cache bumped to uci-calendar-v22
In-app notifications fired on new stage results during background refresh

entries.summary: Race selector as dropdown, all races selectable
changes: Race selector rendered as dropdown below instructions
All races selectable, not just live races
Fixed daysUntil() rounding bug so today's races appear in Upcoming tab
Fantasy teams are now race-keyed — each race has its own team
No mid-race swaps allowed
Team codes are race-scoped
9-rider fantasy squads
Fixed import for team codes
Fixed fModal syntax error
